title: TOAIKOCraft
description: A mod that is aimed at adding every aquarists dream to Minecraft, More Fish!
body:
Have you ever wanted more fish for Minecraft? Do you wish you could make an aquarium in Minecraft with the fish you have in real life? Do you feel the Aquarium section of your Minecraft Zoo is lacking?

TOAIKOCraft aims to answer all those questions and more!

We aim to add fish and many different variants of them to the game in order to spice up your aquariums and your Minecraft world!

Fish Added:
Freshwater Angelfish
Oscar
